emails.subject: Honda Civic — grinding brakes
emails.body: Hi Sofía! My Civic is making a grinding noise when I brake. I think it might be the pads. How soon could you get me in? I'd rather not drive it much like this. — Henry

emails.subject: Re: Invoice — Fleet maintenance 4 vans
emails.body: Hola Sofía, perdón por la demora. Confirmo que mandamos el pago ($2,400) este viernes por Zelle. Los choferes dicen que las vans andan perfectas desde el servicio. Queremos hacer mantenimiento trimestral si tienes disponibilidad. — Roberto, Bay Area Delivery

emails.subject: You have 27 unread direct messages
emails.body: Sofía, you have 27 unread DMs on @reyesautorepair. Most recent: from @davidk_sf 'is anyone awake?? my subaru is shifting really weird'. 9 messages mention 'service', 6 mention 'brakes', 3 mention 'check engine light'.

emails.subject: Invoice #AZ-7821 due May 23
emails.body: Hi Sofía, friendly reminder — invoice for May parts restock ($1,240) is due May 23rd. Pay online or call us. Also: new Bosch brake pad line launching June — would you like a sample set? — AutoZone Pro

emails.subject: Following up on the mechanic position
emails.body: Hi Sofía, this is Diego — we had a great chat last Tuesday. I'm very interested and have two other offers I need to respond to by Friday. Could we lock something in this week? Happy to do a trial day. — Diego

emails.subject: You have a new 3-star review
emails.body: From Stephanie K.: 'Sofía herself is amazing — my brake job was perfect and fair priced. Took off a star because I had to DM Instagram three times to get an appointment, then they didn't have me in the system when I showed up. Scheduling situation is rough.'

emails.subject: ASE certification renewal — action required by August 15
emails.body: Your ASE Master Technician certification expires August 15, 2026. Renew online ($80) or by mail. 20 hours of continuing education required — submit proof with renewal.

emails.subject: 3 new auto repair leads in your area
emails.body: Sofía, you have 3 new auto repair leads for May-June 2026 in San Francisco. Respond within 2 hours to maximize booking rate.

emails.subject: Re: Transmission diagnostic invoice
emails.body: Hi Sofía — I'm so sorry, I completely forgot about this! Let me send it tonight. Also — the transmission has been running perfectly since the service. My dad says you're the only mechanic he trusts. See you for the oil change next month. — Carlos

emails.subject: Second bay lease available next door
emails.body: Hi Sofía — the unit at 2693 Mission is opening up June 1. 400 sq ft with a lift bay, perfect for a second workstation. $2,400/mo. Want to walk through next week? — Patricia
